---
title: "Supplementary Figures S1–S15"
author: "Ding et al."
output:
  bookdown::word_document2: { number_sections: false, toc: true }
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
                      out.width = "100%", dpi = 600)
fig <- function(n, caption) {
  path <- file.path("..", "..", "figures", "supplementary",
                     sprintf("figS%d_*.png", n))
  match <- Sys.glob(path)
  if (length(match) == 0L) {
    knitr::asis_output(sprintf("> *Fig S%d not yet generated — run pipeline.*\n\n", n))
  } else {
    knitr::include_graphics(match[1])
    knitr::asis_output(sprintf("\n\n**Fig. S%d.** %s\n\n", n, caption))
  }
}
```

# Fig. S1 — DHARMa global tests
`r fig(1, "Uniformity, dispersion, outlier and zero-inflation tests for M4.")`

# Fig. S2 — DHARMa spatial residual map
`r fig(2, "Pearson residuals aggregated to province polygons.")`

# Fig. S3 — VIF heatmap
`r fig(3, "Variance inflation factors of M4 fixed-effects covariates.")`

# Fig. S4 — Partial-dependence (top 8 features)
`r fig(4, "Marginal effect of each top-8 feature, XGBoost surrogate.")`

# Fig. S5 — SHAP summary (beeswarm + dependence)
`r fig(5, "SHAP-value beeswarm showing global feature contribution and direction.")`

# Fig. S6 — PR-AUC by fold
`r fig(6, "PR-AUC per spatial-block fold.")`

# Fig. S7 — Reliability per fold
`r fig(7, "Reliability (calibration) curve per fold.")`

# Fig. S8 — MAUP elasticity
`r fig(8, "Climate × effort interaction β across four scales.")`

# Fig. S9 — Offset sensitivity
`r fig(9, "Climate / effort coefficients across five offset specifications.")`

# Fig. S10 — Grid event redefinition (v1 → v2)
`r fig(10, "Raw event count vs redefined event count by grid resolution.")`

# Fig. S11 — CMIP6 per-model maps
`r fig(11, "SSP585 / 2050 hazard score per GCM (5 panels).")`

# Fig. S12 — Covariate-shift PSI
`r fig(12, "PSI per feature for training vs 2024 and training vs SSP2050.")`

# Fig. S13 — Effort panel coverage by province
`r fig(13, "Years with non-zero effort per province, 2002–2024.")`

# Fig. S14 — Species accumulation curve
`r fig(14, "Cumulative count of species recorded as new distribution at province scale.")`

# Fig. S15 — Phylogenetic effort heatmap
`r fig(15, "Top-30 genus × province event-count heatmap.")`
